description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a predominantly dark green body and black accents. The stock is fixed and solid, with a pronounced pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is short and thick, ending in a small muzzle device, and the receiver area is boxy with a detachable box magazine visible beneath. The rifle has a flat top with no visible advanced optics, suggesting the use of basic iron sights. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A dark green, boxy rifle with a fixed stock, pistol grip, short barrel, and detachable box magazine, featuring black accents and a robust, tactical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, short barrel, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, and angular receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the magazine and receiver.
